description:
Offer a client-facing storefront for add-on purchases like extra downloads, premium edits, and print bundles after initial delivery. Tie purchases to Stripe and auto-fulfill digital items immediately.

**Rationale:** Studios commonly monetize after-event demand for more assets. A built-in upsell flow creates new revenue without extra manual sales work.
title: Client Upsell Storefront
